title: Fetch video info from a pasted URL
description: This verifies that a user can paste a valid video URL, fetch its information, and see the video preview needed before downloading.
category: Paste Video URL and Fetch Video Info

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Verify the video information preview is displayed
Verify the thumbnail, title, uploader, duration, and platform badge are displayed

title: Start a quick download from a preset quality
description: This verifies that a user can fetch video info and begin a preset quality download from the quick download options.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Choose a preset quality download option
Confirm the save location if prompted
Verify download progress is displayed
Verify the download completes successfully

title: Fetch video information from a valid URL
description: A user can paste a valid video URL, fetch the video details, and see the information preview needed before downloading.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Click the control to fetch video information
Verify the video information preview is displayed
Verify the video thumbnail and metadata are displayed

title: View advanced format choices and download a specific format
description: This verifies that a user can open advanced format selection, compare format groups, choose a specific format, and start a download from that selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Open advanced format selection
Switch between combined, video only, and audio only formats
Choose a specific format to download
Confirm the save location if prompted
Verify the selected format download starts
Verify the download completes successfully

title: Download with save location handling in a supported browser
description: A user in a browser that supports save location prompts can start a download, confirm progress, and complete the save flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Click the control to fetch video information
Click the preset quality download option
Verify a save location prompt is handled and download progress is displayed
Verify the download completes successfully

title: Block invalid video URLs before fetching
description: This verifies that an invalid or unsupported video URL is rejected and the user sees validation feedback instead of a video preview.
category: Paste Video URL and Fetch Video Info

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in an invalid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the video information preview is not displayed

title: Browse advanced formats and download a specific format
description: A user can open advanced format selection, compare available format groups, choose a specific format, and start a download.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Click the control to fetch video information
Open the advanced format selection
Verify the combined, video-only, and audio-only format groups are displayed
Choose a specific format to download
Verify the download begins

title: Resume after correcting an invalid URL
description: This verifies that a user can recover from an invalid URL, submit a corrected URL, and proceed to a successful download.
category: Paste Video URL and Fetch Video Info

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in an invalid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Verify a validation error is visible
Replace the URL with a valid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Choose a preset quality download option
Confirm the save location if prompted
Verify the download completes successfully

title: Monitor download progress during a long download
description: This verifies that a user can watch download progress feedback while a video is being saved and see completion state when finished.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Choose a preset quality download option
Confirm the save location if prompted
Verify download progress feedback is visible
Verify the completed download state is visible

title: Reset after a completed download and start a new session
description: A user can clear the finished download state with New Download and begin a second download session from scratch.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Click the control to fetch video information
Click the preset quality download option
Verify the download completes successfully
Click the control to start a new download
Verify the download form is reset and ready for another URL

title: Start another download after resetting
description: This verifies that a user can clear the completed session with New Download and immediately begin a second download workflow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Choose a preset quality download option
Confirm the save location if prompted
Verify the completed download state is visible
Click the new download control
Verify the page returns to the initial input state

title: Switch between quick and advanced download modes
description: A user can move between the preset quick download view and advanced format selection while keeping the fetched video information available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Click the control to fetch video information
Open the advanced format selection
Return to the quick download view
Verify the fetched video information remains displayed
Verify the quick download options are displayed

title: Retry downloading from the advanced view after a reset
description: This verifies that a user can open advanced formats, complete a download, reset the session, and access advanced selection again for another download.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Open advanced format selection
Choose a specific format to download
Confirm the save location if prompted
Verify the download completes successfully
Click the new download control
Open advanced format selection
Verify advanced format selection is available again

title: Enter a URL by pasting and submitting with keyboard
description: A user can paste a video URL, submit it with the keyboard, and reach the fetched information preview without using the mouse to submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Press Enter
Verify the video information preview is displayed

title: Show an empty or unsupported URL error
description: A user sees an error when attempting to fetch info without a usable video URL and can then correct the input.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Leave the video URL field empty
Click the control to fetch video information
Verify a validation error is visible
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Click the control to fetch video information
Verify the video information preview is displayed

title: Start a new session after completing a download
description: This test verifies that a completed download can be reset so the user can begin a fresh download session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Paste a valid video URL into the video URL field
Fetch the video information
Start a quick download at a preset quality
Wait for the download to complete
Start a new download session
Verify the video URL field is empty
Verify the download setup is reset

title: Continue a download when progress is indeterminate
description: A user can start a download and still see meaningful in-progress and completion states even when percentage progress is unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid video URL into the video URL field
Click the control to fetch video information
Click the preset quality download option
Verify an in-progress download state is displayed
Verify the download completes successfully

title: Clear the current setup to prepare a new download
description: This test verifies that the reset action clears the current download state so the user can enter a new video URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Paste a valid video URL into the video URL field
Fetch the video information
Start a quick download at a preset quality
Start a new download session
Verify the current video information is cleared
Verify the app is ready for a new download

title: Enter a new video URL after resetting
description: This test verifies that the user can reset the current session and enter a different video URL for a new download.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Paste a valid video URL into the video URL field
Fetch the video information
Start a quick download at a preset quality
Start a new download session
Paste a different valid video URL into the video URL field
Verify the new video URL is accepted
Verify new video information can be fetched

title: Reset after an unfinished download setup
description: This test verifies that the reset action returns the app to an empty state even if the user has only prepared a download and not completed it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Paste a valid video URL into the video URL field
Fetch the video information
Select a preset quality download option
Start a new download session
Verify the download controls are cleared
Verify the video URL field is empty

title: Repeat reset without losing the empty state
description: This test verifies that clicking reset multiple times leaves the app in a clean state ready for a new download.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Paste a valid video URL into the video URL field
Fetch the video information
Start a quick download at a preset quality
Start a new download session
Start a new download session again
Verify the app remains in an empty state
Verify no previous download details are shown

title: Verify platform badge is shown for a YouTube video
description: After fetching a YouTube URL, verify that the correct platform badge with YouTube label and brand color is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid YouTube video URL (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ)
Click the fetch video info control
Verify a platform badge element is visible containing the text 'youtube'
Verify the video title is not empty

title: Verify estimated file sizes are shown on quick download cards
description: After fetching video info, the quick download section should display estimated file sizes next to each quality option.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid YouTube video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Verify quick download quality cards are displayed
Verify at least one quality card shows an estimated file size containing MB or GB

title: Verify 3D floating background icons render on page load
description: The page background should contain floating 3D app icons (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, etc.) rendered as div elements.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the background icons container (id='bgIcons') exists in the DOM
Verify there are multiple child elements with class 'bg-icon' inside the container

title: Verify tab switching shows correct format counts
description: After fetching video info, switching between Combined, Video Only, and Audio Only tabs should update the displayed format list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid YouTube video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Open advanced format selection
Click the 'Video Only' tab
Verify the Video Only tab is now active
Click the 'Audio Only' tab
Verify the Audio Only tab is now active
Verify format cards are displayed for the selected tab

title: Verify error toast appears and disappears for invalid URL
description: When a user submits a non-video URL, an error toast should appear. It should be visible with an error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in an invalid URL like 'https://www.google.com'
Click the fetch video info control
Verify the error toast element becomes visible
Verify the error toast contains an error message text

title: Verify input field has focus on page load
description: When the page first loads, the URL input field should be automatically focused so the user can start typing immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the URL input field (id='urlInput') is focused

title: Verify video duration is displayed after fetching info
description: After fetching info for a video, the duration should be shown on the video preview card.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a valid YouTube video URL
Click the fetch video info control
Verify the video duration element is visible and contains a time format (e.g., numbers with colon separator)

title: Verify Fetch button is disabled when input is empty
description: The Get Video Info button should be disabled when the URL input field is empty, preventing empty submissions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the URL input field is empty
Verify the fetch button (id='fetchBtn') is disabled
Type a URL into the input field
Verify the fetch button is now enabled
Clear the input field
Verify the fetch button is disabled again
